title: Bare Bones Leaves Plus
description: A little more texture for Bare Bones leaves
body:
I love the Bare Bones style, but I know a lot people think that the leaves are kinda boring, and I'm not gonna lie, I also started to get bored by that.

But, none of the packs out there make sense to me, so I decide to try my on point of view to of how the leaves could look like without losing the Bare Bones aesthetic.

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b650919f003d4a2b8c9e4035dbf815763aa6ba_0.webp)

Contact me on my discord (seiyadipessego) to say that this pack is not that good or if you have any problem with it.
